requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Benin Local Fire and Building Authority Requirements and IEC 62933-5-1 in Donor-Financed Projects
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——贝宁地方消防及建筑主管机关要求及捐助方项目中的IEC 62933-5-1
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——貝寧地方消防及建築主管機關要求及捐助方項目中的IEC 62933-5-1

summary.en: Benin does not have a confirmed nationally codified fire installation standard specifically for stationary BESS that has been published and publicly accessible as of the dataset date. Fire safety and building approvals for commercial and industrial installations in Benin are governed by local and national fire and civil protection authorities. The Direction Générale de la Protection Civile et de la Gestion des Risques (DGPCGR), operating under the Ministry of Interior, is the primary civil protection and fire authority at the national level; prefectural and municipal authorities exercise permitting and inspection roles for fixed installations. No confirmed adoption of NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) or a dedicated Beninese fire installation code for BESS was identified from official sources as of the dataset date. In practice, donor-financed BESS projects in Benin (MCC, World Bank, AFD/Proparco, EDF) require compliance with IEC 62933-5-1:2024 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation) and the lender's Environmental, Health and Safety (EHS) framework. High ambient temperatures (commonly 35–40 °C peak), solar irradiation, and harmattan dust require additional fire-risk design attention for outdoor BESS container installations, including thermal runaway propagation mitigation, active ventilation or cooling, and dust ingress management. Exporters and project EPCs should engage the relevant local fire authority and the project owner's EHS consultant at the earliest design stage to determine applicable requirements.
summary.zh: 截至本数据集日期，贝宁尚无经确认的专门针对固定式BESS已发布且可公开获取的全国性消防安装标准。贝宁商业和工业设施的消防安全及建筑审批由地方和国家消防及民事保护主管机关管辖。民事保护与风险管理总局（DGPCGR）隶属于内政部，是国家层面的主要民事保护和消防主管机关；省级和市级主管机关对固定装置行使许可和检查职能。截至本数据集日期，未从官方来源确认NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）的采纳或专门针对BESS的贝宁消防安装规范。实践中，贝宁捐助方资助的BESS项目（MCC、世界银行、AFD/Proparco、EDF）要求遵守IEC 62933-5-1:2024（储能系统——安全考量——危险识别、风险评估和风险缓解）及贷款机构的环境、健康和安全（EHS）框架。高环境温度（峰值通常达35–40°C）、太阳辐射和哈马丹扬尘对户外BESS集装箱安装提出额外消防风险设计要求，包括热失控蔓延缓解、主动通风或冷却以及防尘入侵管理。出口商和项目EPC承包商应在设计最早阶段与相关地方消防主管机关及项目业主的EHS顾问接触，以确定适用要求。
summary.zht: 截至本數據集日期，貝寧尚無經確認的專門針對固定式BESS已發布且可公開獲取的全國性消防安裝標準。貝寧商業和工業設施的消防安全及建築審批由地方和國家消防及民事保護主管機關管轄。民事保護與風險管理總局（DGPCGR）隸屬於內政部，是國家層面的主要民事保護和消防主管機關；省級和市級主管機關對固定裝置行使許可和檢查職能。截至本數據集日期，未從官方來源確認NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）的採納或專門針對BESS的貝寧消防安裝規範。實踐中，貝寧捐助方資助的BESS項目（MCC、世界銀行、AFD/Proparco、EDF）要求遵守IEC 62933-5-1:2024（儲能系統——安全考量——危險識別、風險評估和風險緩解）及貸款機構的環境、健康和安全（EHS）框架。高環境溫度（峰值通常達35–40°C）、太陽輻射和哈馬丹揚塵對戶外BESS集裝箱安裝提出額外消防風險設計要求，包括熱失控蔓延緩解、主動通風或冷卻以及防塵入侵管理。出口商和項目EPC承包商應在設計最早階段與相關地方消防主管機關及項目業主的EHS顧問接觸，以確定適用要求。

standards_or_laws: Direction Générale de la Protection Civile et de la Gestion des Risques (DGPCGR), Benin Ministry of Interior — national civil protection and fire authority; project-specific fire-safety approval required for commercial and industrial installations; no confirmed BESS-specific code as of dataset date

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level fire and safety standard referenced in donor-financed project specifications for Benin)
IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (includes thermal runaway and fire-related safety requirements at cell/module level)
World Bank Group Environmental Health and Safety Guidelines for Thermal Power Plants and Renewable Energy — applicable as lender EHS framework for World Bank-financed BESS projects in Benin
AFD/Proparco EHS Standards — applicable as lender EHS framework for AFD/Proparco-financed BESS projects in Benin

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety through a combination of mandatory national standards and project-level fire-safety review by local fire authorities. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 36276-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire review in China follows local fire authority approval procedures under the National Fire and Rescue Administration. Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by Benin's fire and civil protection authorities as equivalent to applicable Beninese or donor-referenced international fire-safety requirements. BESS fire-safety evidence under Chinese standards must be supplemented with IEC 62933-5-1 system safety documentation and site-specific thermal and ventilation design for Benin's climate conditions (high ambient temperature, solar irradiation, harmattan dust) in donor-project and local authority review.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性国家标准和地方消防主管机关项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 36276-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查遵循国家消防救援局下的地方消防主管机关审批程序。中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被贝宁消防及民事保护主管机关认可为等同于适用贝宁或捐助方引用国际消防安全要求的等效依据。在捐助方项目和地方主管机关审查中，依据中国标准编制的BESS消防安全证据须补充IEC 62933-5-1系统安全文件，以及针对贝宁气候条件（高环境温度、太阳辐射、哈马丹扬尘）的现场热环境和通风设计。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性國家標準和地方消防主管機關項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 36276-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查遵循國家消防救援局下的地方消防主管機關審批程序。中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被貝寧消防及民事保護主管機關認可為等同於適用貝寧或捐助方引用國際消防安全要求的等效依據。在捐助方項目和地方主管機關審查中，依據中國標準編制的BESS消防安全證據須補充IEC 62933-5-1系統安全文件，以及針對貝寧氣候條件（高環境溫度、太陽輻射、哈馬丹揚塵）的現場熱環境和通風設計。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems; covers system-level safety including fire-related requirements)

gap.en: Gap: No confirmed nationally codified fire installation standard specifically for stationary BESS exists in Benin as of the dataset date. Regardless, fire and building authority approval from the relevant prefectural or municipal authority and the national DGPCGR is a project-execution requirement for commercial and industrial BESS installations. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy Benin fire authority or donor EHS requirements. Exporters and project teams should: (a) engage the competent prefectural or municipal fire authority and the national DGPCGR at the earliest project stage to determine applicable fire codes and permitting requirements; (b) prepare BESS system fire-safety documentation aligned with IEC 62933-5-1, including hazard identification, thermal runaway propagation assessment, gas detection and ventilation design, active fire suppression system specifications (where required by the fire authority or donor EHS framework), and emergency shutdown and response procedures; (c) engineer BESS enclosure and PCS for Benin's ambient conditions — minimum IP55 dust and weather ingress protection, thermal management validated at 35–40 °C ambient, and fire-risk design for high-temperature battery conditions; (d) confirm donor EHS framework obligations (World Bank, AFD/Proparco, MCC) before finalising fire-safety system design and equipment specification.
gap.zh: 差距：截至本数据集日期，贝宁尚无经确认的专门针对固定式BESS的全国性消防安装标准。尽管如此，相关省级或市级主管机关及全国DGPCGR的消防和建筑主管机关审批是商业和工业BESS装置项目执行的必要条件。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足贝宁消防主管机关或捐助方EHS要求。出口商和项目团队应：（a）在项目最早阶段与有管辖权的省级或市级消防主管机关及全国DGPCGR接触，确定适用消防规范和许可要求；（b）准备符合IEC 62933-5-1的BESS系统消防安全文件，包括危险识别、热失控蔓延评估、气体探测和通风设计、主动消防抑制系统规格（如消防主管机关或捐助方EHS框架要求）以及紧急停机和应急程序；（c）针对贝宁环境条件设计BESS机柜和PCS——最低IP55防尘防水进入保护、在35–40°C环境下验证的热管理，以及针对高温电池条件的消防风险设计；（d）在最终确定消防安全系统设计和设备规格前确认捐助方EHS框架义务（世界银行、AFD/Proparco、MCC）。
gap.zht: 差距：截至本數據集日期，貝寧尚無經確認的專門針對固定式BESS的全國性消防安裝標準。儘管如此，相關省級或市級主管機關及全國DGPCGR的消防和建築主管機關審批是商業和工業BESS裝置項目執行的必要條件。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足貝寧消防主管機關或捐助方EHS要求。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）在項目最早階段與有管轄權的省級或市級消防主管機關及全國DGPCGR接觸，確定適用消防規範和許可要求；（b）準備符合IEC 62933-5-1的BESS系統消防安全文件，包括危險識別、熱失控蔓延評估、氣體探測和通風設計、主動消防抑制系統規格（如消防主管機關或捐助方EHS框架要求）以及緊急停機和應急程序；（c）針對貝寧環境條件設計BESS機櫃和PCS——最低IP55防塵防水進入保護、在35–40°C環境下驗證的熱管理，以及針對高溫電池條件的消防風險設計；（d）在最終確定消防安全系統設計和設備規格前確認捐助方EHS框架義務（世界銀行、AFD/Proparco、MCC）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — fire and civil protection authority approval required for commercial and industrial installations in Benin; no confirmed BESS-specific national fire installation code as of dataset date — engage DGPCGR and local fire authority directly; donor EHS framework compliance mandatory for MCC, World Bank, and AFD/Proparco-financed projects
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements under the National Fire and Rescue Administration

source.publisher: République du Bénin — Portail officiel du Gouvernement (Benin government portal; DGPCGR operates under Ministry of Interior)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed nationally codified fire installation standard specifically for stationary BESS has been identified for Benin as of the dataset date. Fire and civil protection authority approval is a mandatory project gate for commercial and industrial BESS installations. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Benin fire authority or donor EHS requirements. Engage the competent local fire authority and DGPCGR at the earliest project stage, and prepare IEC 62933-5-1-aligned system safety documentation engineered for Benin's high-temperature and dust environment before committing to system layout or equipment specification. Confirm all applicable donor EHS framework obligations before final equipment procurement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，贝宁尚无经确认的专门针对固定式BESS的全国性消防安装标准。消防及民事保护主管机关审批是商业和工业BESS装置的强制项目门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足贝宁消防主管机关或捐助方EHS要求。在确定系统布局或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与有管辖权的地方消防主管机关和DGPCGR接触，并准备针对贝宁高温和扬尘环境设计的符合IEC 62933-5-1的系统安全文件。在最终设备采购前确认所有适用的捐助方EHS框架义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，貝寧尚無經確認的專門針對固定式BESS的全國性消防安裝標準。消防及民事保護主管機關審批是商業和工業BESS裝置的強制項目門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足貝寧消防主管機關或捐助方EHS要求。在確定系統布局或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與有管轄權的地方消防主管機關和DGPCGR接觸，並準備針對貝寧高溫和揚塵環境設計的符合IEC 62933-5-1的系統安全文件。在最終設備採購前確認所有適用的捐助方EHS框架義務。
